hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 > /dev/null 2>&1 && pnpm biome check --write --unsafe "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 > /dev/null 2>&1 && pnpm build 2>/dev/null || echo '{"stopReason": "Build failed. Please fix errors before finishing."}'
